name: Buttermilk Pralines
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix sugar, buttermilk, soda water, and salt in a heavy 3-quart saucepan.
2. Cook over medium heat to the soft-ball stage.
3. Cool mixture.
4. Beat in butter and vanilla.
5. Stir in pecans.
6. Drop by tablespoons onto wax paper to cool.
7. If it starts to harden in the pan, add a few drops of buttermilk, reheat, and stir well.
